subject: Action needed: guppy planning in Berlin | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-3789
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Berlin. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Frida Kahlo seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-3789. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: review, delivery.
